STUDY ACME-DM2-302: A Phase 2 Study of StudyDrug in Type 2 Diabetes

Schedule of Assessments:
- V1 Baseline (Day 0): Vitals, Labs (HbA1c), ECG. No window.
- V2 Week 2 (Day 14, window ±2 days): Vitals, Labs.
- V3 Week 4 (Day 28, window ±3 days): Vitals, Labs, ECG.

Inclusion Criteria:
I1. Adults 18-75 with type 2 diabetes.
I2. HbA1c between 7.0% and 10.5% at screening.

Exclusion Criteria:
E1. Pregnancy or plans to become pregnant.
E2. HbA1c > 10.5% at screening.
